case_title: HUI LING HUANG VS. QUYEN SO TROUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER PARKMAN JOE PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HUANG, HUI LING AS TO DEFENDANT TROUNG, QUYEN SO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HUANG, HUI LING
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, HUI LING ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TROUNG, QUYEN SO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, HUI LING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TROUNG, QUYEN SO JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT SHOULD BE LIABLE FOR THE COST OF REPAIR OR CANCELLATION OF THE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
